name_en: Dior 1:1 Counter Authentic Top-Grade Imported Factory Embroidery (D-Journey) Monogram Fabric. This D-Journey Handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the Dior 2025 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear show. It features a soft texture and a modern reinterpretation of the dumpling bag silhouette. Crafted from blue denim calfskin, it is accented with flat oversized diagonal quilting, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern. The main compartment features a zip pocket, and two side pockets with large leather zip pulls, each adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal Christian Dior Paris logo, making it easy to store various small daily items. The small size comes with an adjustable top handle and leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand carrying, shoulder carrying, or crossbody wear, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
